chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 815 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3995/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For hearing of main case 29.05.2024 Petitioner Illahi Bux Jamali, present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 & 3. Petitioner is a professional advocate and seeking inquiry against the Food Department for issuing illegally bardana to irrelevant persons, however, he has not submitted any proof to support his contention. Therefore, this petition is dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
